skills.label: One-variable displays and summaries
skills.description: Practice and review: Exploring One-Variable Data. Topics include Distributions and displays; Center, spread, shape; Percentiles and z-scores.

skills.label: Bivariate association and regression
skills.description: Practice and review: Exploring Two-Variable Data. Topics include Scatterplots and association; Linear regression and residuals; Correlation vs causation.

skills.label: Sampling and experimental design
skills.description: Practice and review: Collecting Data. Topics include Sampling methods and bias; Experiments vs observational studies; Blocking, blinding, confounding.

skills.label: Probability and random variables
skills.description: Practice and review: Probability, Random Variables, and Probability Distributions. Topics include Probability rules; Discrete random variables; Binomial and geometric models.

skills.label: Sampling distributions
skills.description: Practice and review: Sampling Distributions. Topics include Sampling variability; Mean and proportion sampling distributions; Central limit theorem intuition.

skills.label: Inference for proportions
skills.description: Practice and review: Inference for Categorical Data: Proportions. Topics include Confidence intervals for proportions; Significance tests for proportions; Conditions and errors.

skills.label: Inference for means
skills.description: Practice and review: Inference for Quantitative Data: Means. Topics include t-intervals and t-tests; Two-sample means; Paired data.

skills.label: Chi-square inference
skills.description: Practice and review: Inference for Categorical Data: Chi-Square. Topics include Goodness of fit; Homogeneity and independence; Expected counts and conditions.

skills.label: Inference for regression slope
skills.description: Practice and review: Inference for Quantitative Data: Slopes. Topics include Inference for regression slope; Conditions and residual checks; Interval vs test for slope.
